project.name: linear-pi-project-admin-agent
project.summary: Validate a Linear-native project admin runtime before controlled writes.
goals: Build plans from Fact Pack evidence before Linear mutation.
nonGoals: Do not enable unconfirmed automatic Linear writes in v0.1.
successMetrics: Project Plan reviewer returns pass for this sample.

milestones.name: M2 | Planning review
exitCriteria: Reviewer catches missing labels, dependencies, and fact boundaries.

issues.title: Review Project Plan before Write Guard
acceptanceCriteria: npm run plan:review -- examples/project-plan.sample.json --strict returns pass.
openQuestions: Which later milestone should carry non-MVP reviewer enhancements?

facts.claim: Complex planning requires a Fact Pack before writing to Linear.

assumptions: This sample is a local review fixture and does not write to Linear.
openQuestions: Whether to add semantic LLM review in vNext remains a product decision.
